families.label: Aggregation
families.description: Transformations that combine multiple referents or structural components into a unified whole.

families.label: Association
families.description: Transformations that establish, alter, or represent relations among referents without implying containment.

families.label: Attestation
families.description: Transformations that record evidence, verification, or claims about a referent.

families.label: Branching
families.description: Transformations that produce divergent continuations from a referent.

families.label: Containment
families.description: Transformations that place a referent within a containing structure or organizational enclosure.

families.label: Contextual
families.description: Transformations that bind, unbind, or otherwise alter contextual placement or applicability.
families.note: No separate Domain/Family/Contextual.lean file was shown; constructor and mappings are confirmed through TransformationFamily and Operator.Semantics.

families.label: Decomposition
families.description: Transformations that divide a referent into constituent components, parts, branches, or sub-referents.

families.label: Migration
families.description: Transformations that relocate a referent across a relation, bearer, context, or structural position while maintaining linkage.

families.label: Normative
families.description: Transformations that apply, alter, or record normative authority, permission, or standing.

families.label: Projection
families.description: Transformations that derive a partial view, selected representation, or projection of a referent.

families.label: Replication
families.description: Transformations that produce a duplicate, replica, copy, or copied representation of a referent.

families.label: Reorganization
families.description: Transformations that alter arrangement, ordering, or organizational placement without necessarily changing membership.

families.label: Scaling
families.description: Transformations that increase or decrease structural scale, detail, complexity, or elaboration.

families.label: Versioning
families.description: Transformations that produce, identify, restore, or relate temporally ordered versions of a referent.
